TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_caay_katatudung_a_sasalamaan, title = caay_katatudung_a_sasalamaan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/caay_katatudung_a_sasalamaan} }

S.FORM: caay katatudung a sasalamaan kakiliman "caay katatudung a sasalamaan" (yinkelis a kamu, Jumanji, Cong-kul-ta-lu musakamu "u mibalakas tu matalulay ", Syang-kang musakamu "milaliw tu mapalaw" ) u cacayay a mapalaw a giki nu Amuhuwan i 1995 a mihcaan, masasumad tu Ke-li-si-huan-ay-si-pul-ke tu malecaday a ngangan tu wawaay a cudad, u Jiyaw-yuhan-sidun misagiki, Lubin-uwayliyansi, Bonnie Hunt, Kesiting-tensite atu Pulaydeli-pilelsi misagikiay. 2005 a mihcaan tu " tusaay a nisagiki tu caay katatudung a sasalamaan: mulimekay a sin-ciw" malatusaay a nimiduduc a giki, kanahaw tu kina tusaay a giki ulaed tu cacay a bataan nu mihcaan. nilacul kungku 1969 a mihcaan, sabaw tusa a mihcaan ci Ya-lun atu Sa-la malalikeluh a milabu tu wamamapatay a sasalamaan tu mahiniay, culasatu ku lacu'say, ci Ya-lun maala nu sidi'tuay a kakititaan, salawbes aca ku tademaw. nadikudan i tusaay a bataan izaw ku enem a mihcaan(1995 a mihcaan), izaw kya malkakaay ci Cu-li atu Pi-de tayda malimad i Ya-lun a luma', kakekan mapatahkal ci Ya-lun i kitakit nu di'tuay. mahida itida i tatanga han siaadupan pasutademaw tayni i kitakit palula'cus. a palekal tu kitakiay kanca a mitepal ci Sa-laan, kya malaheci ku nu tawyaay cayay hen kami a kigi. misagikiay mituduc a giki 2015 a miheca waluay a bulad idaw ku lima a demiad, a misaika tu Sul-ni giki a muliyaw aca tu "micidekay u caay katatudung a sasalamaan", namahida na i 2016 a mihcaan sabaw tusaay a bulad idaw ku tusa a bataan ku lima a demiad i Amuhuwan papiadihay. u katinengan i wang-lu caay kakapah ku tengil yu mahida sa, u sangalepan aca sinikapatay ku misagikiay ci lu-pin-wuy-len-si. ci Cu-si-ciyang-sen, Kay-wun-ha-te, Cye-ke-pu-lay-ke, Ni-ke-ciyang-na-si atu Kay-lun-ci-lan misagiki. Cu-si-ciyang-sen matineng caay piliyaw patahkal tina gikian, u tada mituducay a giki, namakay i Siya-wi-yi ku nikalinga' tu. natikudan, kina giki tatenga'ay tu i 2017 a mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad izaw ku tusaay a bataan a demiad i Amuhuwan patahkal papiadih. sapatahkal tu nakawawan
S.PHON: ¶aaj katatuduŇč a sasar~…ĺamaan kakir~…ĺiman " ¶aaj katatuduŇč a sasar~…ĺamaan" (jink…ôr~…ĺis a kamu, *umanji, ¶oŇč-kur~…ĺ-ta-r~…ĺu musakamu "u mibar~…ĺakas tu matar~…ĺur~…ĺaj ", sjaŇč-kaŇč musakamu "mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu mapar~…ĺaw" ) u ¶a ¶ajaj a mapar~…ĺaw a giki nu amuńßuwan i **** a mińß ¶aan, masasumad tu k…ô-r~…ĺi-si-ńßuan-aj-si-pur~…ĺ-k…ô tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ŇčaŇčan tu wawaaj a ¶udad, u *ijaw-juńßan-sidun misagiki, r~…ĺubin-uwajr~…ĺijansi, bonni…ô ńßunt, k…ôsitiŇč-t…ônsit…ô atu pur~…ĺajd…ôr~…ĺi-pir~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺsi misagikiaj. **** a mińß ¶aan tu " tusaaj a nisagiki tu ¶aaj katatuduŇč a sasar~…ĺamaan: mur~…ĺim…ôkaj a sin- ¶iw" mar~…ĺatusaaj a nimidudu ¶ a giki, kanańßaw tu kina tusaaj a giki ur~…ĺa…ôd tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu mińß ¶aan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ kuŇčku **** a mińß ¶aan, sabaw tusa a mińß ¶aan ¶i ja-r~…ĺun atu sa-r~…ĺa mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß a mir~…ĺabu tu wamamapataj a sasar~…ĺamaan tu mańßiniaj, ¶ur~…ĺasatu ku r~…ĺa ¶u Ē~ °saj, ¶i ja-r~…ĺun maar~…ĺa nu sidi Ē~ °tuaj a kakititaan, sar~…ĺawb…ôs a ¶a ku tad…ômaw. nadikudan i tusaaj a bataan izaw ku …ôn…ôm a mińß ¶aan(**** a mińß ¶aan), izaw kja mar~…ĺkakaaj ¶i ¶u-r~…ĺi atu pi-d…ô tajda mar~…ĺimad i ja-r~…ĺun a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, kak…ôkan mapatańßkar~…ĺ ¶i ja-r~…ĺun i kitakit nu di Ē~ °tuaj. mańßida itida i tataŇča ńßan siaadupan pasutad…ômaw tajni i kitakit par~…ĺur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us. a par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kitakiaj kan ¶a a mit…ôpar~…ĺ ¶i sa-r~…ĺaan, kja mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nu tawjaaj ¶ajaj ńß…ôn kami a kigi. misagikiaj mitudu ¶ a giki **** a mińß…ô ¶a war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad idaw ku r~…ĺima a d…ômiad, a misaika tu sur~…ĺ-ni giki a mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a tu "mi ¶id…ôkaj u ¶aaj katatuduŇč a sasar~…ĺamaan", namańßida na i **** a mińß ¶aan sabaw tusaaj a bur~…ĺad idaw ku tusa a bataan ku r~…ĺima a d…ômiad i amuńßuwan papiadińßaj. u katin…ôŇčan i waŇč-r~…ĺu ¶aaj kakapańß ku t…ôŇčir~…ĺ ju mańßida sa, u saŇčar~…ĺ…ôpan a ¶a sinikapataj ku misagikiaj ¶i r~…ĺu-pin-wuj-r~…ĺ…ôn-si. ¶i ¶u-si- ¶ijaŇč-s…ôn, kaj-wun-ńßa-t…ô, ¶j…ô-k…ô-pu-r~…ĺaj-k…ô, ni-k…ô- ¶ijaŇč-na-si atu kaj-r~…ĺun- ¶i-r~…ĺan misagiki. ¶u-si- ¶ijaŇč-s…ôn matin…ôŇč ¶aaj pir~…ĺijaw patańßkar~…ĺ tina gikian, u tada mitudu ¶aj a giki, namakaj i sija-wi-ji ku nikar~…ĺiŇča Ē~ ° tu. natikudan, kina giki tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu i **** a mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad izaw ku tusaaj a bataan a d…ômiad i amuńßuwan patańßkar~…ĺ papiadińß. sapatańßkar~…ĺ tu nakawawan
S.FORM: caay katatudung a sasalamaan kakiliman "caay katatudung a sasalamaan" (yinkelis a kamu, Jumanji, Cong-kul-ta-lu musakamu "u mibalakas tu matalulay ", Syang-kang musakamu "milaliw tu mapalaw" ) u cacayay a mapalaw a giki nu Amuhuwan i 1995 a mihcaan, masasumad tu Ke-li-si-huan-ay-si-pul-ke tu malecaday a ngangan tu wawaay a cudad, u Jiyaw-yuhan-sidun misagiki, Lubin-uwayliyansi, Bonnie Hunt, Kesiting-tensite atu Pulaydeli-pilelsi misagikiay. 2005 a mihcaan tu " tusaay a nisagiki tu caay katatudung a sasalamaan: mulimekay a sin-ciw" malatusaay a nimiduduc a giki, kanahaw tu kina tusaay a giki ulaed tu cacay a bataan nu mihcaan. nilacul kungku 1969 a mihcaan, sabaw tusa a mihcaan ci Ya-lun atu Sa-la malalikeluh a milabu tu wamamapatay a sasalamaan tu mahiniay, culasatu ku lacu'say, ci Ya-lun maala nu sidi'tuay a kakititaan, salawbes aca ku tademaw. nadikudan i tusaay a bataan izaw ku enem a mihcaan(1995 a mihcaan), izaw kya malkakaay ci Cu-li atu Pi-de tayda malimad i Ya-lun a luma', kakekan mapatahkal ci Ya-lun i kitakit nu di'tuay. mahida itida i tatanga han siaadupan pasutademaw tayni i kitakit palula'cus. a palekal tu kitakiay kanca a mitepal ci Sa-laan, kya malaheci ku nu tawyaay cayay hen kami a kigi. misagikiay mituduc a giki 2015 a miheca waluay a bulad idaw ku lima a demiad, a misaika tu Sul-ni giki a muliyaw aca tu "micidekay u caay katatudung a sasalamaan", namahida na i 2016 a mihcaan sabaw tusaay a bulad idaw ku tusa a bataan ku lima a demiad i Amuhuwan papiadihay. u katinengan i wang-lu caay kakapah ku tengil yu mahida sa, u sangalepan aca sinikapatay ku misagikiay ci lu-pin-wuy-len-si. ci Cu-si-ciyang-sen, Kay-wun-ha-te, Cye-ke-pu-lay-ke, Ni-ke-ciyang-na-si atu Kay-lun-ci-lan misagiki. Cu-si-ciyang-sen matineng caay piliyaw patahkal tina gikian, u tada mituducay a giki, namakay i Siya-wi-yi ku nikalinga' tu. natikudan, kina giki tatenga'ay tu i 2017 a mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad izaw ku tusaay a bataan a demiad i Amuhuwan patahkal papiadih. sapatahkal tu nakawawan

musakamu "mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu mapar~…ĺaw" ) u ¶a ¶ajaj a mapar~…ĺaw a giki nu amuńßuwan i **** a mińß ¶aan, masasumad tu k…ô-r~…ĺi-si-ńßuan-aj-si-pur~…ĺ-k…ô tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ŇčaŇčan tu wawaaj a ¶udad, u *ijaw-juńßan-sidun misagiki, r~…ĺubin-uwajr~…ĺijansi, bonni…ô ńßunt, k…ôsitiŇč-t…ônsit…ô atu pur~…ĺajd…ôr~…ĺi-pir~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺsi misagikiaj. **** a mińß ¶aan tu " tusaaj a nisagiki tu ¶aaj katatuduŇč a sasar~…ĺamaan: mur~…ĺim…ôkaj a sin- ¶iw" mar~…ĺatusaaj a nimidudu ¶ a giki, kanańßaw tu kina tusaaj a giki ur~…ĺa…ôd tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu mińß ¶aan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ kuŇčku **** a mińß ¶aan, sabaw tusa a mińß ¶aan ¶i ja-r~…ĺun atu sa-r~…ĺa mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß a mir~…ĺabu tu wamamapataj a sasar~…ĺamaan tu mańßiniaj, ¶ur~…ĺasatu ku r~…ĺa ¶u Ē~ °saj, ¶i ja-r~…ĺun maar~…ĺa nu sidi Ē~ °tuaj a kakititaan, sar~…ĺawb…ôs a ¶a ku tad…ômaw. nadikudan i tusaaj a bataan izaw ku …ôn…ôm a mińß ¶aan(**** a mińß ¶aan), izaw kja mar~…ĺkakaaj ¶i ¶u-r~…ĺi atu pi-d…ô tajda mar~…ĺimad i ja-r~…ĺun a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, kak…ôkan mapatańßkar~…ĺ ¶i ja-r~…ĺun i kitakit nu di Ē~ °tuaj. mańßida itida i tataŇča ńßan siaadupan pasutad…ômaw tajni i kitakit par~…ĺur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us. a par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kitakiaj kan ¶a a mit…ôpar~…ĺ ¶i sa-r~…ĺaan, kja mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nu tawjaaj ¶ajaj ńß…ôn kami a kigi. misagikiaj mitudu ¶ a giki **** a mińß…ô ¶a war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad idaw ku r~…ĺima a d…ômiad, a misaika tu sur~…ĺ-ni giki a mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a tu "mi ¶id…ôkaj u ¶aaj katatuduŇč a sasar~…ĺamaan", namańßida na i **** a mińß ¶aan sabaw tusaaj a bur~…ĺad idaw ku tusa a bataan ku r~…ĺima a d…ômiad i amuńßuwan papiadińßaj. u katin…ôŇčan i waŇč-r~…ĺu ¶aaj kakapańß ku t…ôŇčir~…ĺ ju mańßida sa, u saŇčar~…ĺ…ôpan a ¶a sinikapataj ku misagikiaj ¶i r~…ĺu-pin-wuj-r~…ĺ…ôn-si. ¶i ¶u-si- ¶ijaŇč-s…ôn, kaj-wun-ńßa-t…ô, ¶j…ô-k…ô-pu-r~…ĺaj-k…ô, ni-k…ô- ¶ijaŇč-na-si atu kaj-r~…ĺun- ¶i-r~…ĺan misagiki. ¶u-si- ¶ijaŇč-s…ôn matin…ôŇč ¶aaj pir~…ĺijaw patańßkar~…ĺ tina gikian, u tada mitudu ¶aj a giki, namakaj i sija-wi-ji ku nikar~…ĺiŇča Ē~ ° tu. natikudan, kina giki tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu i **** a mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad izaw ku tusaaj a bataan a d…ômiad i amuńßuwan patańßkar~…ĺ papiadińß. sapatańßkar~…ĺ tu nakawawan
